verse_text: Or with rulers who had abundant gold And filled their houses with silver;

links.context: Job expressed a similar sentiment of being oppressed when he wished that he had never been born to see such sorrow ([[JOB.3:10]]-16). But Christ has sent a comforter, the Holy Spirit ([[JOH.14:16]]), to wipe away all tears. Verse 2 speaks of the communion of the saints.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
